title: PlatformEventEnvelope
description: Canonical event envelope for the sovereign-platform event backbone. Layer A transport is the in-process jarvis_events log; Layer B transport is Kafka. The envelope is identical across both so producers/consumers do not change when the backbone is swapped.

produced_by.description: Service or agent identity that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Ties a chain of related events together.

causation_id.description: The event_id that directly caused this event.

payload.description: Event-type-specific body, validated against its family schema.
